abilities.name: inner-focus
abilities.flavorText: The Pokémon's intense focus prevents it from flinching or being affected by Intimidate.

abilities.name: ice-body
abilities.shortEffect: Heals for 1/16 max HP after each turn during hail. Protects against hail damage.
abilities.effect: This Pokémon heals for 1/16 of its maximum HP after each turn during hail, and it does not take hail damage regardless of type.
abilities.flavorText: The Pokémon gradually regains HP in snow.

abilities.name: moody
abilities.shortEffect: Raises a random stat two stages and lowers another one stage after each turn.
abilities.effect: After each turn, one of this Pokémon's stats at random rises two stages, and another falls one stage. If a stat is already at 6 or -6 stages, it will not be chosen to be increased or decreased, respectively.
abilities.flavorText: Every turn, one of the Pokémon's stats will be boosted sharply but another stat will be lowered.
